title: alpinia celebica
intro: Alpinia celebica, also known as the Celebes katuk or Indonesian spinach, is a perennial plant native to Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Alpinia celebica are often used in teas, soups, and salads, as well as being dried or frozen for later use.
